> The prompt_sha schema/resolver/test changes are implemented in cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql, cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go, cli/internal/server/graphql/generated.go, and cli/internal/server/graphql/efficacy_sessions_test.go, but the normal GraphQL package build is already blocked by pre-existing duplicate resolver implementations in cli/internal/server/graphql/ resolver.go and the split resolver files (for example resolver_feat008.go and resolver_artifacts_mutation.go). Running `go test ./internal/server/graphql -count=1` fails before the new promptSha test can execute. The agent package verification does pass (`go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestExecuteBeadInstructionsLoadBearingGuardrails|TestExecuteBeadInstructionsHarnessSelector|TestExecuteBeadInstructionsRenderedInvariants|TestExecuteBeadInstructionsMissingGoverningGate|TestExecuteBeadInstructionsSizeFloor|TestPromptSizeReport|TestPromptSHA_DeterministicAcrossRenders' -count=1`). A follow-up needs a repo-wide resolver deduplication or build-tag cleanup so the GraphQL package can compile normally under the standard test command.

`go test ./internal/server/graphql -count=1` fails before the new `promptSha` coverage can be validated because the package currently contains duplicate resolver method definitions in both `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver.go` and `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go` (for example `BeadClose`, `WorkerDispatch`, `EfficacyRows`, and `EfficacyAttempts`). The generated GraphQL surface also expects the new optional `promptSha` argument, but the package cannot compile until the duplicate resolver layout is untangled. The prompt-size CI fixture and session-index `prompt_sha` plumbing were updated, but end-to-end verification is blocked by this broader GraphQL packaging issue.

rationale: verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run 'TestPromptSizeReport|TestPromptSHA_DeterministicAcrossRenders' -count=1 && go test ./internal/server/graphql -run 'TestEfficacyRowsCanFilterByPromptSHA' -count=1 && rg -n 'PromptSHA: promptSHA|json:"prompt_sha"|promptSha' internal/agent/execute_bead.go internal/agent/execute_bead_artifacts_test.go internal/agent/execute_bead_promptsize_test.go internal/server/graphql/efficacy_sessions_test.go

Rationale:
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go` already writes `PromptSHA` into the execute-bead `manifest.json` artifact.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_artifacts_test.go` already asserts the manifest contains `prompt_sha` and matches `sha256(prompt.md)`.
- `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_promptsize_test.go` already implements the render-size CI fixture with byte ceilings and writes the report artifact.
- `cli/internal/server/graphql/efficacy_sessions_test.go` already covers `EfficacyRows(promptSha)` and `EfficacyAttempts(promptSha)` filtering.
- No source changes were required to satisfy the bead contract in this worktree.
